skills.name: Woodland Inheritor
skills.effect: Forrest's expert lumberjack skills increase the Town's Sawmill Output by X%.

skills.name: Burnished Iron
skills.effect: Seth passes on his passion for iron mining, increasing the Town's Iron Output by X%.

skills.name: Craftsmanship
skills.effect: Seth has a special bond with Iron, increasing Iron Mining Speed in the Wilderness by X%.

skills.name: Stone Mining

skills.name: Sixth Sense
skills.effect: Senses for dangers ahead, reducing damage taken by X% for all troops.

skills.name: Precision Shot

skills.name: Defenders' Edge
skills.effect: Howard guards our troops with his shield, reducing damage taken by X% for all troops.

skills.name: Weaken
skills.effect: Howard's intimidating presence reduces the total Enemy Squads' Attack by X%.

skills.name: Super Nutrients
skills.effect: Gordon's culinary masterpieces invigorate soldiers, increasing total Squads' Health by X%.

skills.name: Trash Talk
skills.effect: Beyond delicious meals, Gordon's trash talk increases total Squads' Attack by X%.

skills.name: Stand of Arms
skills.effect: Chenko implements advanced weaponry for our soldiers, increasing the total Squads' Lethality by X%.

skills.name: Shield Wall
skills.effect: Enhances troop armor with a keen engineering eye, reducing damage taken by X% for all troops.

skills.name: Desert Eclipse
skills.effect: A rising cloud of sand is terrible for visibility, reducing all Enemy Squads' Damage Dealt by X%.

skills.name: Pathfinder
skills.effect: Fahd has always been a pathfinder for his warriors, increasing Solo Hunting March Speed by X%.

skills.name: On Guard
skills.effect: Raises all Squads' total Lethality by X%.

skills.name: Well-Traveled
skills.effect: Boosts Research Speed by X%.

skills.name: Tri-Phalanx

skills.name: Exorcism

skills.effect: Increases Construction Speed by X%, and reduces Construction Costs by X%.

skills.effect: Increasing the total Squads' Lethality by X%.

skills.effect: Helga has a X% chance of reducing damage taken by 50% for all squads.

skills.name: Echoes of Valhalla
skills.effect: Helga blows the horn to motivate the squad, increasing the total Squads' Attack by X%.

skills.name: Nature's Balance
skills.effect: Helga invites everyone to embrace nature, increasing the total Squads' Lethality by X%.

skills.name: Battle Ready
skills.effect: Excels in boosting morale, increasing the total Squads' Lethality by X%.

skills.name: Way of the Blade
skills.effect: Imparts the secrets of swordsmanship, increasing the total Squads' Attack by X%.

skills.name: Unrighteous Strike
skills.effect: Unique swordplay has a X% chance of increasing damage dealt by 50% for all squads.

skills.name: Rally Flag
skills.effect: Jabel with her banner-like red armor, has a X% chance of reducing damage taken by 50% for all squads.

skills.name: Hero's Domain
skills.effect: Jabel, a fearless knight, grants all squads a 50% chance of dealing X% more damage when attacking.

skills.name: Youthful Rage
skills.effect: Jabel's valiant spirit inspires everyone increasing damage dealt by X% for all squads.

skills.name: Noble Path
skills.effect: Increases the total squads' Attack and Defense by X% and X%

skills.name: Elixir of Strength
skills.effect: Granting all squads' attack a 25% chance of dealing X% damage

skills.effect: X% chance of reducing damage taken by 50% for all squads.

skills.effect: X% chance of increasing damage dealt by 50% for all squads.

skills.effect: Grants all squads a 20% chance of reducing the total Enemy Squads' Lethality by X% for 2 turns when attacking.

skills.name: Dynamo
skills.effect: 50% chance of increasing damage dealt by X%.

skills.effect: 20% chance of inflicting Sunder, dealing X% damage per turn for 3 turns.

skills.effect: Increases total Squads' Attack by X%.

skills.name: Infinite Arsenal
skills.effect: 50% chance of amplifying enemy squads' damage taken by X%.

skills.name: The Tempest
skills.effect: 20% chance of increasing Squad's damage dealt by X% for 3 turns

skills.effect: 20% chance of reducing the total Enemy Squad's Lethality by X% for 2 turns.

skills.effect: Increases the total Squad's Health by X%

skills.effect: 50% curse chance increasing damage taken by X%

skills.effect: Reducing the total Enemy Squads' Attack by X%

skills.name: Exhortation

skills.name: Holy Warrior
skills.effect: Increases total Squads' Attack by X%

skills.name: Subterfuge
skills.effect: X% chance to dodge Normal Attacks

skills.name: Sleight Hand
skills.effect: 25% chance for extra attack dealing X% damage

skills.name: Rescuing Hands
skills.effect: Reduces Infantry and Archer's Damage Taken by X% every 5 turns for 2 turns

skills.name: Praetorian Will
skills.effect: Increases Infantry Damage Dealt by X% and Cavalry and Archer's Damage Dealt by 10%

skills.name: Carpe Diem
skills.effect: Increasing Infantry Damage Dealt per attack by X% and target Damage Taken by 25% for 1 turn

skills.name: Chaos Gambit
skills.effect: 40% chance of increasing all Squads' Damage Dealt by X%

skills.name: Rose of War
skills.effect: Reducing damage dealt by X% for all enemy squads

skills.name: Golden Rhythm
skills.effect: Increasing Archers' total Attack by X%

skills.name: Battle Hunger
skills.effect: Thrud's battle fever inspires her Infantry and Archers, reducing their damage taken by X% and increasing their damage dealt by X%.

skills.name: Reckless Charge
skills.effect: No plans. No finesse. Just brutally charging into battle. Thrud's Cavalry has a 20% chance of dealing X% extra damage to all enemies on attack.

skills.name: Ancestral Guidance
skills.effect: Ancestral spirits guide the brave to Valhalla. For every 4 attacks made by Cavalry, all squads' damage dealt is increased by X% and damage taken is reduced by X% for 2 turns.

skills.name: Mighty Paragon
skills.effect: Long Fei's courage in the teeth of the enemy points the way toward the warrior within, granting a 40% chance of reducing damage taken by all squads by X%.

skills.name: Celestial Sustenance
skills.effect: The sweet nectar of Long Fei's potions have born fruit in soldiers' vitality, increasing total Squads' Defense by X%.

skills.name: Art of War
skills.effect: . Long Fei's war wisdom is ingrained in his soldiers, granting all squads' attacks a 25% chance of dealing X% damage.

skills.name: Crouching Tiger
skills.effect: Vivian is a patient commander willing to wait for just the right moment to strike. All squads' attacks increase enemy damage taken by X%.

skills.name: Focus Fire
skills.effect: Vivian's sharp focus exposes enemy weaknesses, granting all squads' attack X% extra damage after every four attacks, and causes the target to receive X% extra damage for its next attack received.

skills.name: Trap of Greed
skills.effect: Vivian equips her Archers with custom coin traps, dealing X% extra damage to all enemies on the next attack of every 4 attacks.

skills.name: Arcane Pact
skills.effect: The arcane pact grants Sophia the protection of night, and a X% chance of reducing all squad damage received by 50% every turn.

skills.name: Terror - Deathblow
skills.effect: Sophia radiates a fearsome aura that has a chance to inflict Terror on enemy targets. Enemy targets suffer the effects of Terror every 2 turns and will receive X% increased Cavalry damage on the following turn. Terror lasts 1 turn.

skills.name: Terror - Annihilation
skills.effect: Terror increases fragility. All Squads deal X% increased damage to Terrified targets.

skills.name: Command of Power
skills.effect: Acceptance of Triton's authority enables the fruits to be shared thereof, increasing total Squads' Defense by X%.

skills.name: Warfare of Power
skills.effect: The power of warfare lies in shared fearlessness in the face of battle, increasing total Squads' skill damage dealt by X%.

skills.name: Oath of Power
skills.effect: Great power stems from a willingness to keep oaths, increasing Infantry Health by X% as well as Cavalry and Archer Health by X%.

skills.name: Avalanche
skills.effect: An avalanche for Yang is just another weapon in his arsenal, resulting in an additional strike against a target by all Squads every 4 turns for X% damage.

skills.name: Ice Zone
skills.effect: Years of arctic adversity have taught Yang to seize advantages. Yang's Archers have a 40% chance of dealing X% extra damage with every attack.

skills.name: Ambush
skills.effect: Yang is an advanced thinker who can easily grasp the principles of almost any phenomena, giving all Squads a X% chance of dealing increased damage every turn.

skills.name: Artillerymen
skills.effect: The inclusion of the artillerymen has an overall helpful effect of increasing Squad's total Attack by X% and total Lethality by X%.

skills.name: Chain Shelling
skills.effect: Wee & Woo's devastating back-to-back rounds tear shreds through the enemy lines, increasing Squad's Damage Dealt to Archer by X% and to Infantry by X%.

skills.name: Boom Boom
skills.effect: There's always someone in every cannon duo who can aim well. Wee & Woo's presence gives Squad's Attack a X% chance of dealing 50% extra damage.

skills.name: Intimidation
skills.effect: The terrifying presence of the massive Angel of Justice on the battlefield reduces enemy Squad's Total Lethality by X%.

skills.name: Iron Bodies
skills.effect: Superior metal armor forging blunts the impact of conventional weapons, reducing Squad's Damage Taken by X%

skills.name: Great Justice
skills.effect: The Angel of Justice comes outfitted with state-of-the-art battlefield medkits, increasing Squad's total Health by X%.

skills.name: Dissolution
skills.effect: An artist sees what others cannot. Ava's deconstructive gaze sees vulnerabilities, reducing total Enemy Squad's Defense by X%.

skills.name: Chiaroscuro
skills.effect: Bright light and dark shadow can blind enemies who do not expect it. All enemy soldiers receive X% increased damage for 2 turns every 4 turns.

skills.name: Light and Cold
skills.effect: Ava's weapons are like twin beacons for all to follow, increasing soldiers' Lethality by X%.
